name: terminal
description: Execute shell commands. Two modes: pty=false for one-shot execution, pty=true for persistent interactive sessions that preserve state (cwd, environment, history) across calls.

cmd.description: Command to execute. For pty=false: binary name only (e.g., 'npm', 'git', 'python3'). For pty=true: command to run in persistent shell (e.g., 'npm install', 'cd src', 'pwd').

args.description: Command arguments (pty=false mode only). Pass args separately instead of in cmd string.

timeout_sec.description: Execution timeout in seconds. 0 means no timeout (default for pty=true). In background mode, caps the running process duration.

cwd.description: Working directory override. For pty=true: relative to playground_root. First call auto-cds here; subsequent calls preserve session cwd unless this parameter is passed.

session_name.description: REQUIRED for pty=true. Session identifier (e.g., 'build', 'debug'). Different names = independent shells. Same name = reuse shell with preserved state.

background.description: Async execution. true=return immediately with status 'background', notify on completion. false=wait for completion.

pty.description: Execution mode. false=one-shot (simple execution, no state), true=persistent interactive shell (state preserved across calls via session_name).
